goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0011 (M3 PR-B verifier) verified PASS on 2026-05-30. PR #158 squash-merged into main as commit bfc2ae6 — feat(revision): land M3 PR-B — manifest, resolver, compat-mirror, JobCount. Branch impl/task-0010-m3-revision-prb deleted; local main fast-forwarded; git status --short clean.

Verifier adjudications (all accepted with Risk Notes; no spec proposal filed): (1) Branch-3 ErrNotFound fallthrough is paranoia — revisionKeyPattern requires rev- prefix, cannot collide with branches 4/5/6 in practice. (2) JobCount Option A — Config.JobCount=0 ambiguity between 'empty plan' and 'unknown' persists; M5 callers will encode real counts. (3) Compat-mirror latest.json via store.Write — last-write-wins, byte-identical, naturally idempotent. NB: implementer report claimed checksum mirror uses CreateIfAbsent with ErrExists-as-success; code actually uses Write. Behavior matches spec; report prose drift only.
Coverage on PR #158 final: internal/revision=90.4% (gate ≥90%); internal/statestore=96.1% (M2 floor preserved). All quality gates green: go build/vet, go test -race ./..., make test-state-redesign.

M3 milestone CLOSES with this merge. Next milestone = **M4 — internal/executionstate + runner bridge** per specs/orun-state-redesign/implementation-plan.md §M4. The PR-B-shipped UpdateLatestExecutionSummary helper gets its first real caller in M4 (executionstate writer). Suggested PR scope: 1–2 PRs covering model.go (ExecutionRun/RunnerProfile/ExecSummary), writer.go (NextExecutionKey/SanitizeExecID/CreateExecution/UpdateSnapshot/MarkTerminal), bridge.go (Bridge{Store,LegacyRoot,MirrorMode} + MirrorRunnerOutput hardlink-with-copy-fallback), resolver.go (ResolveExecution with legacy fallback per compat §4).

Risk-Notes carried into M4: (a) UpdateLatestExecutionSummary has zero in-tree callers until M4 wires it; first real-load test of CAS + idempotent-short-circuit dance is M4. (b) WriteManifest overwrites unconditionally via store.Write — corrupted on-disk manifest silently replaced on next WriteRevision. (c) JobCount=0 ambiguity (see above). (d) implementer-report-vs-code drift on latest.json sentinel handling — flagged for the implementer's awareness, non-blocking.

Persistent local environment quirk (NOT a regression): kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml occasionally fails on composition-cache resolution. Reproduces sporadically since Task 0001 on main and PR branches. CI passes the same invocation; CI is authoritative.
